description: image_read for an oversized browse-only parish baptism register image — exceeds MAX_INLINE_IMAGE_BYTES (~700 KB), so the tool refuses to return it inline and yields an actionable 'too large to return inline' error. Used to test that record-extraction treats the transport size cap as a hard stop on the first hit (no repeated re-fetch of the same image) and pivots to an indexed record.

response.error: FamilySearch image 004884748_02613 is 2.4 MB — too large to return inline. The MCP transport caps a single response near 1 MB and base64 encoding inflates the payload ~33%. Fetch a smaller image or pivot to an indexed record for the same event.
